'''Wildernerfs''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of herd beast that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Noquivzor]]. They were frequently hunted by [[taopari]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
